description_long: This peach is round and plump, with a slightly flattened top and bottom, and a pronounced central groove running from the stem end to the base. Its skin is a blend of warm orange, yellow, and red hues, with a velvety, matte texture and subtle speckling. The front view reveals a deep cleft and the exposed pit, indicating the peach has been cut in half, showing the fibrous, juicy flesh and the rough, brown stone. The sides and back display a gradient of colors, with more red blush on one side and a softer yellow-orange on the other. The surface appears mostly smooth with a few natural imperfections, and there is no visible stem or leaf attached. This peach would be commonly found in urban environments such as markets, fruit stands, or discarded on sidewalks.
description: A round, velvety peach with a deep central groove, exposed pit, and a blend of orange, yellow, and red hues. The flesh is juicy and the skin is mostly smooth with natural color gradients.
description_view_0: Front view showing the peach cut in half, exposing the pit and juicy flesh with a deep central groove.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the rounded shape and soft yellow-orange skin with subtle speckling.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the smooth, unbroken skin with a dominant reddish-orange blush.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing a mix of orange and red tones with a slightly matte, velvety surface.
